title: dactylorhiza sesquipedalis
intro: Dactylorhiza sesquipedalis, also known as the long-spurred marsh orchid, is a species of orchid native to Ireland and the United Kingdom. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza sesquipedalis include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Dactylorhiza sesquipedalis is often prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
